name: WEIS MARKETS INC
summary: Weis Markets, Inc. is a Pennsylvania-based retail food company founded in 1912, operating 202 supermarkets across Pennsylvania, Maryland, New York, New Jersey, Virginia, Delaware, and West Virginia. Stores sell groceries, dairy, frozen foods, meats, seafood, fresh produce, floral, pharmacy services, deli products, prepared foods, bakery, beer and wine, and fuel. The company self-distributes approximately 52% of products and operates three manufacturing facilities processing milk, water, ice, ice cream, and fresh meat.

products.name: Retail Grocery Stores
products.description: 202 supermarkets selling center store, fresh, pharmacy, and fuel products under the Weis Markets brand.

products.name: Weis 2 Go Online
products.description: Online ordering service offering delivery or drive-thru pickup, available at 195 store locations.

products.name: Home Delivery
products.description: Grocery home delivery available at all 202 locations via multiple third-party grocery delivery partners.

products.name: Pharmacy Services
products.description: In-store pharmacy services contributing 13.6% of consolidated net sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Fuel Centers
products.description: Fuel stations operated under the Weis Gas-n-Go brand, contributing 5.0% of net sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Private Label Products
products.description: Store-brand products including natural, gluten-free, and organic varieties sold under Weis private labels.

products.name: Manufacturing Facilities
products.description: Three facilities processing milk, water, ice, ice cream, and fresh meat products for store supply.

partnerships.description: Loyalty reward points redeemable at third-party fuel station partner locations.
Home delivery offered to customers at all 202 store locations via multiple grocery delivery partners.
Weis Markets is exclusive licensee of nearly 100 trademarks registered in the U.S. from WMK Holdings, Inc.
